title: Raccoon Removal in Irvington, NY | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Irvington, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion, and cleanup. Licensed experts serving historic Irvington homes. Call today for fast service!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Irvington, NY, where historic homes and tree-lined streets provide ideal nesting opportunities in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Irvington and greater Westchester County, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed wildlife specialists protect your property while ensuring safe, effective removal.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Irvington's unique architectural landscape, from historic river estates to modern residences. Our team understands local wildlife patterns and building structures, providing customized solutions with guaranteed results and full damage restoration services.
localContext: Irvington's proximity to the Hudson River and preserves like Matthiessen Park creates perfect habitat for raccoons seeking shelter in residential areas. The village's many older homes with mature trees and architectural details like decorative soffits and chimneys are particularly vulnerable to raccoon intrusion, requiring specialized exclusion techniques that preserve historic character.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Irvington typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of animals, entry points requiring exclusion, and necessary attic cleanup or damage repair. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Irvington, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Irvington due to the abundance of wooded areas, proximity to the Hudson River, and older homes with accessible attics and chimneys. The village's mature tree canopy and quiet residential streets provide ideal conditions for raccoon activity, particularly during spring birthing season.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Irvington home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Irvington service calls within 24 hours for inspections. Trapping and removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons, though baby raccoons during spring may require additional time for safe, humane removal. Emergency same-day service is available for urgent situations.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in Irvington homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer complete restoration services including insulation replacement, structural repairs, sanitization, and odor removal. Our team is experienced working with Irvington's historic homes and can match existing materials and architectural details while securing entry points to prevent future intrusions.
